product_title: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: The best bubbly water
reviews.body: I love spindrift!!!! Love it love it love it! And, they're honest about their ingredients. Not like this other brands. I'm going to buy more! Nike that there's definitely a strong flavor here, so try a can if you can before you get a big box
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: Tastes Better
reviews.body: While the price for this sparkling water is a bit higher than many grocery store brands, trust me when I tell you that the taste makes it worth it. I am not usually a big fan of unsweetened, sparkling water since it typically tastes the same as when your foot falls asleep. That being said, I realize the need to increase my H2O intake and find plain water to be too insipid. I gave this a shot and sure enough, they use real fruit juice according to the flavor you're drinking....not artificial flavoring....the real deal fruit juice. They also put a higher percentage of juice than any other brand in their product and it makes it far tastier than you'd expect with zero or single digit calories.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: My fave sparkling water
reviews.body: I love the product just a salty I can get a 30 pack at Costco for less money just not these flavors 🙃
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: Strawberry and blackberry are excellent, raspberry flavors are okay
reviews.body: The strawberry and blackberry flavors are REALLY good - they taste exactly like what you'd expect if you mashed up some berries and added them to soda water. Very fresh and natural tasting, a big step up from the artificial-tasting LaCroix IMO. There is zero added sugar though, so don't expect much sweetness or big flavor, it's just a hint of berry. The mixed raspberry flavors are kinda meh though and the flavors don't mix that well and tend to drown out the raspberry flavor. Would've preferred just a straight raspberry flavor. They aren't bad so worth a try if the mixed flavors sound interesting to you.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: Can't get enough of the 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack
reviews.body: To begin, I love Diet Coke. I love it. But now that we're home more in a COVID-19 world, I wanted to make some healthier choices. Giving up soda entirely proved very difficult for me. How can anyone drink water all the time? That lead me to healthier soda alternatives. After trying *a lot* (and I mean a lot) of products, the Spindrift 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack was by far my favorite. I like it so much, I have a subscription so I don't run out while in quarantine. The flavor and carbonation are great. Plus, because it's just fruit and soda, I'm happy with what I'm drinking. These also make an easy cocktail for any 21+ people. Healthier option *and* getting to switch things up from water...big win.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: Better than most.
reviews.body: I didn't like it but it's was better than many others I have tried. Needs a little more flavor
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: Great taste and fresh ingredients.
reviews.body: First time trying these drinks. All have a fresh taste, quench my thirst and are made with simple ingredients. I have given up on all drinks because you have to choose between loaded with sugar or artificial sweetener. My 20YO son land I love these drinks. I already placed another order. These price is great and thank you for Prime shipping to Alaska.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: Tastes like a fountain drink that's out of syrup.
reviews.body: Ever fill up a fountain drink at the gas station or fast food joint and take a sip....only to find they are out of the syrup? That carbonated water taste that is about as bland as a rice cake? That's EXACTLY what this tastes like...except they added a new chemical aftertaste that causes each can to be 9 caolires. Those flavors on the front of the can mean nothing. It all tastes the same. For $22 I could have gone local and bought just plain old seltzer water. IF YOU ARE EXPECTING SWEET .... This is nowhere near sweet. It is bitter and bubbly. The only way I can finish this expensive box of crap is to pour a crystal light packet into each can.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: Delicious, but no "value" for buying more
reviews.body: I LOVE Spindrift and this flavor variety does not disappoint. But after doing some of the math, this is not a good deal... Looks like a usual 8 pack goes for about $5-6, making it around $0.63 a can. But this pack is (was - at the time I bought it) 20 cans for $22, a whopping $0.90 per can. Not a huge difference, but still bummed I paid more for the "value" pack!! I know it's my fault so just want to spread the word to others to check twice before buying! It adds up when you go through as many as I do 😂
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans

reviews.title: Some were really good, others not
reviews.body: Some of these, such as the cranberry, is very good and refreshing! But, others, like the grape, kind of taste vaguely like a fruit vinegar. It isn’t so repulsive I couldn’t drink it, it just wasn’t enjoyable. I was still able to drink it, so it only lost one star.
reviews.product_name: Spindrift Sparkling Water, 4 Flavor Berry Variety Pack, Made with Real Fruit, 12 Fl Oz, Pack of 20 Seltzer Water Cans
